Who We Are

A Kapok Products Manufacturer & Bulk Supplier Based in Indonesia

PT Best Kapok Fiber is a reputable Indonesian supplier and exporter headquartered in Jember, East Java — the heartland of Indonesia's kapok industry. We offer premium kapok fiber, kapok seed, kapok seed meal, and kapok seed oil for industrial buyers and international markets.

With extensive experience serving both domestic clients and international partners, we provide clean, reliable, and consistently processed raw materials backed by professional documentation and responsive B2B service.

Our mission is to be the most trusted Kapok Fiber Supplier in Indonesia for industrial manufacturers, importers, and wholesalers requiring a dependable, high-quality bulk supply partner.

Material Intelligence

What is Kapok Fiber & Why It Matters

Kapok (Ceiba pentandra) delivers a rare combination of natural properties unmatched by synthetic or conventional fibers.

Naturally Hypoallergenic

Kapok fiber is naturally free from allergens, safe for bedding, baby products, and medical applications without any chemical treatment.

8× Lighter Than Cotton

With a density of ~0.035 g/cm³, kapok dramatically reduces material weight without compromising performance in any application.

No Chemical Treatment

Naturally silky and moisture-repellent, kapok requires no bleaching or chemical processing — ideal for clean-label and organic products.

Superior Buoyancy

Hollow air-filled cell structure provides exceptional flotation — used in life vests, marine safety gear, and specialized industrial padding.

Market Applications

Industries That Use Kapok Products

Kapok fiber and kapok seed oil serve a diverse range of industrial sectors worldwide — from traditional bedding manufacturers to emerging sustainable textile innovators.

Buyer Information

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Kapok Fiber?

Kapok fiber is a natural, plant-based fiber extracted from seed pods of the Ceiba pentandra tree. Roughly 8× lighter than cotton, it is hypoallergenic, naturally water-resistant, with hollow air-filled cells providing exceptional insulation and buoyancy — all without chemical processing.

What is Kapok Seed Oil?

Kapok seed oil is a vegetable oil cold-pressed from kapok seeds. Its fatty acid profile resembles cottonseed oil and is used in industrial lubricants, cosmetics formulations, soap manufacturing, and bio-fuel research applications.

What industries use Kapok Fiber?

Kapok fiber is used in bedding and mattress manufacturing, marine life-safety flotation equipment, automotive upholstery, eco-friendly stuffing products, natural thermal insulation, and emerging sustainable textile innovations.

Why source Kapok products from Indonesia?

Indonesia is the world's largest producer of kapok fiber. East Java — particularly the Jember region — has optimal tropical climate and fertile volcanic soil for Ceiba pentandra cultivation, producing kapok renowned for its purity, natural whiteness, and consistent year-round quality.

Why choose PT Best Kapok Fiber?

PT Best Kapok Fiber offers direct factory supply from Jember, East Java with export-ready processing, competitive bulk pricing, flexible shipping terms (FOB, CIF, CFR), full export documentation including MSDS and phytosanitary certificates, and a responsive team serving international buyers worldwide.

Company Overview

A Trusted Partner for Global Kapok Procurement

PT Best Kapok Fiber is a reputable Indonesian supplier and exporter of kapok products, headquartered in the Wuluhan district of Jember Regency, East Java — one of Indonesia's most productive kapok-growing regions.

We offer a complete range of kapok-derived products: raw kapok fiber, kapok seed, kapok seed meal, and kapok seed oil. Our supply chain is vertically integrated, allowing us to control quality from farm level through to final processing and export packaging.

Our mission is to be the most trusted Kapok Fiber Supplier in Indonesia for industrial manufacturers, importers, and wholesalers requiring a dependable, high-quality bulk supply partner.

Our Capabilities

Manufacturing, Quality & Export Capabilities

Manufacturing Capability

  • Integrated kapok fiber cleaning and processing
  • Seed separation and sorting facility
  • Oil extraction and refining unit
  • Meal processing and packaging
  • Bulk bagging and containerization

Export Capability

  • Full export documentation (MSDS, CoA, Phytosanitary)
  • Flexible incoterms: FOB, CIF, CFR, EXW
  • LCL and FCL container shipments
  • Shipping via Tanjung Perak & Tanjung Emas ports
  • Experienced with multi-country customs requirements

Quality Standards

  • Physical and chemical property testing
  • Moisture content control per buyer specification
  • Foreign matter and impurity inspection
  • Consistent fiber color and grade classification
  • Batch-by-batch quality documentation

Sustainable Sourcing

  • Sourced from Ceiba pentandra trees in East Java
  • No deforestation — trees not felled during harvest
  • Supports smallholder farmers in Jember region
  • Biodegradable and fully renewable material
  • Committed to responsible agricultural practices
Our Journey

Building a Trusted Supply Partnership

Origin

Founded in Jember, East Java

PT Best Kapok Fiber was established in Jember, at the heart of Indonesia's kapok production region, built to serve growing global demand for natural, sustainable industrial fibers.

Growth

Expanding Product Range

We expanded from kapok fiber to include kapok seed, seed meal, and seed oil — providing buyers a complete range of kapok-derived products from a single trusted source.

Global

Serving International Markets

Today we serve industrial buyers, importers, manufacturers, and wholesalers across Asia, Europe, and the Americas with export-ready products and professional trade support.

Future

Quality & Sustainability

We continue to invest in processing capacity and quality systems to ensure every order consistently meets standards international buyers rely on for long-term supply partnerships.

Geographic Advantage

Why Source Kapok Products from Indonesia?

Indonesia is the world's leading producer of kapok fiber, and East Java — particularly the Jember and Lumajang regions — has the highest concentration of Ceiba pentandra cultivation in the country.

The tropical climate, fertile volcanic soil, and established farming practices make Indonesian kapok naturally superior in fiber purity, whiteness, and consistent yield — harvested by hand without chemical processing.

Proximity to major ports (Tanjung Perak in Surabaya, Tanjung Emas in Semarang) ensures efficient containerized export to buyers worldwide.

East Java

Kapok Capital of Indonesia

Raw Natural Kapok Fiber — Export Grade

Kapok Fiber

Kapok fiber is the primary product of the Ceiba pentandra tree, extracted from its mature seed pods. Our kapok fiber undergoes mechanical cleaning and separation to remove seeds, hull fragments, and foreign matter, producing a clean, fluffy fiber ready for industrial use.

With a natural density of approximately 0.035 g/cm³ — roughly 8 times lighter than cotton — kapok fiber is one of the most lightweight natural fibers in the world. Its hollow, air-filled cell structure provides exceptional thermal insulation, acoustic damping, and buoyancy properties.

PT Best Kapok Fiber supplies kapok fiber in baled form for containerized export, available in standard and premium grades by purity and fiber length.

Industrial Applications

Bedding & mattress filling
Pillow and cushion stuffing
Marine life safety flotation
Automotive seat padding
Thermal & acoustic insulation
Eco-friendly stuffed products
Natural fiber blending
Sustainable textile innovation

Cleaned & Sorted Kapok Seeds — Industrial Grade

Kapok Seed

Kapok seeds are small, round, dark-brown seeds found within kapok fiber pods. After fiber extraction, the seeds are separated, cleaned, and sorted. Our kapok seeds are primary raw material for downstream processing into kapok seed oil and seed meal, with a high oil content of typically 20–30%.

The oil extracted from kapok seeds has a fatty acid profile similar to cottonseed oil, making it suitable for industrial lubricant formulation, soap manufacturing, and bio-fuel research.

Industrial Applications

Kapok seed oil extraction
Kapok seed meal production
Industrial feedstock
Bio-fuel research
Agricultural research

Min. OrderPlease inquire
High-Protein By-Product — Feed & Fertilizer Grade

Kapok Seed Meal

Kapok seed meal is the solid by-product remaining after oil is extracted from kapok seeds. It is a high-protein material (typically 25–30% crude protein) used as an ingredient in animal feed formulations or as an organic nitrogen source in agricultural fertilizer applications.

Our kapok seed meal is processed at our Jember facility and is available in defatted powder or granulated form for various downstream applications.

Industrial Applications

Animal feed ingredient
Poultry feed formulation
Aquaculture feed
Organic nitrogen fertilizer
Soil amendment / agriculture
Export Grade
IndustrialCosmeticsLubricantOleochemical
Product Specifications

ColorYellow to greenish-yellow
Fatty AcidsLinoleic, Oleic, Palmitic, Stearic
Acid ValuePer specification
Moisture & ImpuritiesPer specification
PackagingDrums / IBC totes / flexitanks
Min. OrderPlease inquire
Industrial-Grade Kapok Oil — Bulk Supply

Kapok Seed Oil

Kapok seed oil is extracted from kapok seeds through mechanical pressing or solvent extraction. It is a pale yellow to amber semi-drying oil with a distinctive fatty acid composition including linoleic acid, oleic acid, palmitic acid, and stearic acid — with a profile similar to cottonseed oil.

Industrial-grade kapok oil is widely used in lubricant manufacturing, soap production, and as a raw material in oleochemical industries. Refined kapok oil also finds applications in cosmetics and bio-diesel research.

Industrial Applications

Industrial lubricant formulation
Soap and detergent manufacturing
Oleochemical industry feedstock
Cosmetics and personal care
Bio-fuel / bio-diesel research
Textile processing oil
